items.name: motion-tokens
items.title: Motion Tokens
items.description: The tuned duration/ease/variant tokens — the single source of truth for blaze-motion's feel. Edit the `feel` block to retune the whole engine.

items.name: motion-provider
items.title: Motion Provider
items.description: LazyMotion(strict, domAnimation) + MotionConfig(reducedMotion='user'). Mount ONCE in your root layout.
items.docs: Wrap your root layout's {children} with <MotionProvider> exactly once. Primitives import `m` from motion/react-m; a raw motion.* throws under strict mode.

items.name: fade-in
items.title: Fade In
items.description: Opacity-only fade for on-mount / above-the-fold reveals.

items.name: reveal
items.title: Reveal
items.description: Scroll-triggered rise-from-below. Straight tween, no spring overshoot.

items.name: stagger
items.title: Stagger
items.description: Stagger + StaggerItem — flat named exports for staggered children reveals.

items.name: cinematic-image
items.title: Cinematic Image
items.description: Scale-down 110%→100% settle for large hero images. Wrap in an overflow-hidden box.

items.name: page-transition
items.title: Page Transition
items.description: AnimatePresence route transition keyed on routeKey.

items.name: core
items.title: Core Bundle
items.description: The full blaze-motion primitive set — tokens, provider, and all five primitives — in one install.
